## Disagreements

No substantive disagreements found between the three specialist drafts. All three specialists agreed on the core framing: a local CLI tool targeting developer-entrepreneurs. The architect, designer, and market analyst all accepted the original frame without shifting it. There are no incompatible assumptions or contradictory recommendations that would require a downstream choice.

## Branching axes

No branching axes identified. The specialists are in alignment on the fundamental shape of the product, the target user, and the interaction model. The explore phase will be skipped.
